fun_facts: Honey never spoils. Archaeologists found 3000-year-old honey in Egyptian tombs that was still edible.
Octopuses have three hearts and blue blood.
A group of flamingos is called a flamboyance.
Bananas are berries, but strawberries aren't.
The shortest war in history lasted 38-45 minutes between Britain and Zanzibar in 1896.
general_knowledge.weather_info: Use an online service or ask the user for current weather. I don't have live internet access.
